name: CEC - TV On
description: Send HDMI CEC power-on command to the TV (CEC address 0).

name: CEC - TV Standby
description: Send HDMI CEC standby (power off) command to the TV (CEC address 0).

name: CEC - Set Active Source
description: Tell the TV to switch its active HDMI input to the Raspberry Pi.

name: CEC - Set Inactive Source
description: Tell the TV the Raspberry Pi is no longer the active source.

name: CEC - Volume Up
description: Send HDMI CEC volume up command to the TV or audio system.

name: CEC - Volume Down
description: Send HDMI CEC volume down command to the TV or audio system.

name: CEC - Mute Toggle
description: Send HDMI CEC mute/unmute toggle to the TV or audio system.

name: CEC - Send Raw Command
description: Send a raw cec-client command string (e.g. 'on 0', 'standby 5', 'as'). For advanced use.
